subject: TSL Daily Digest — Mar 16, 2026
html:
TSL Daily Digest — March 16, 2026

For Sam & David

Key moves today:

  • Sam and David wrapped their weekly catch-up — Supabase migration is complete and now serving as the main source of truth (replacing Airtable), home page card layout changes are next, and pitch deck triage was confirmed as the key feature unlock once the homepage lands.
  • Three-way meeting with Charlotte covered her full fund evaluation process in detail (1–5 scoring system, 4 P’s framework, Fund 1 benchmarks), and she expressed genuine interest in a formal TSL advisory role — with a clear condition: the product has to reach her usage standard before she makes LP introductions.
  • Charlotte locked in April 27 at 6pm for the NY LP event and set a firm deadline: pitch deck triage demo by next week. That’s the gate.

Priorities for tomorrow:

  1. product Complete the pitch deck triage demo — Charlotte wants it by ~Mar 18 and it’s the unlock for her advisory commitment and the path to first revenue. Everything else waits on this.
  2. gtm (David) Prepare 5 pitch decks (mix of spinout and ex-founder types) for Charlotte’s live triage session — needs to be ready before or at the demo meeting.
  3. ops Draft Charlotte’s advisory agreement — Dessel Group venture partner template is the starting point; structure needs to cover equity issuance, vesting triggers, and full documentation per today’s discussion.

Watch list:

  • DocSend extraction is still a blocker for full pitch deck triage (many decks are non-downloadable). Narayan (David’s contact) is the lead to chase — no movement noted yet.

Open tasks:

  • [Sam] Build pitch deck triage demo — committed to Charlotte by ~Mar 18
  • [Sam] Send Supabase field structure to David for fund database standardization
  • [David] Prepare 5 pitch decks (spinout vs. ex-founder mix) for Charlotte review — from today’s meeting
  • [David] Complete Shy Goldman fund list in CSV format — carrying forward from Mar 13
  • [David] Inbound follow-ups — carrying forward
  • [David] Connect with Marco re: emerging manager pipeline — from Mar 13
  • [Both] Finalize Charlotte advisory agreement structure

Source: Sam / David Weekly Catch Up (Mar 16), TSL/Allocator Ideas +Charlotte (Mar 16), Sam / David Co-Work (Mar 13), Charlotte / Sam Sync (Mar 11)
